title: bidens discoides
intro: Bidens discoides, also known as Small Bur Marigold, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family, characterized by its yellow flowers and discoid shape. Traditionally, Bidens discoides has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Bidens discoides include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Bidens discoides can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
